steps.title: Keep the subject together
steps.content: The blank forms the subject of the sentence: a measured desert name followed by "is classified." A comma should not split a subject from its verb.

steps.title: Remove disruptive commas
steps.content: A and C leave a comma before the verb, and A and B also separate the measurement from the desert name. The uninterrupted noun phrase keeps the subject grammatical. The answer is D.
